headline: Eli Lilly’s China Obesity Bet And What It Means For Valuation
summary: Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) plans to invest US$3b in China over the next decade. The funding is aimed at supporting the launch and local production of orforglipron, its oral obesity drug. The company is seeking approval from Chinese regulators as it looks to expand access across China and broader Asia. Eli Lilly is known for its treatments in diabetes, obesity, and other chronic conditions, and orforglipron sits at the center of that focus as a once daily oral GLP 1 therapy. The planned US$3b...
